prompt: Photorealistic photo of a grassy park. A chaotic, zig-zagging paved pathway swerves wildly to touch every single scattered autumn leaf, making it completely unusable for walking. Next to it, a simple, straight dirt trail naturally crosses the park. Realistic physical scene, no text, no diagrams, no glowing lights.
metaphor: A chaotic path overcomplicates its route to perfectly hit every random fallen leaf (noise), while a straight dirt trail effectively crosses the park (generalization).
